banner.schedule: Open beta tester recruitment planned for August 2026

hero.sub: No dedicated equipment or streaming crew needed. Deliver pro-quality multi-camera live coverage from the circuit using just your smartphone and a browser.

feature1.body:
Receive up to 8 smartphones
simultaneously via SRT protocol.
Visualize bitrate and packet loss
in real time.
items: Camera connection status at a glance

feature2.body:
Secure your streaming slot
with a few clicks from your browser.
Just follow the guide from
setup to connection.

feature3.body:
Receive low-latency SRT streams
from anywhere in the country.
Integrate with YouTube Live
to reach a global audience.
items: Forward to YouTube Live or any RTMP destination
Stable quality even over mobile networks

steps.title: Go live in just 5 steps
steps.sub: No complex setup required. From account creation to live streaming in as little as 30 minutes.

items.title: Sign up (free)
items.desc: Pre-register with just your email and password. You'll be notified first when the beta begins.

items.title: Reserve a slot
items.desc: Select your streaming date and time from the calendar. Book in 15-minute increments.

items.title: Receive SRT info
items.desc: After booking, your SRT connection URL and stream ID are automatically generated.

items.title: Start streaming
items.desc: Use any SRT-compatible app to stream from your smartphone. Multiple devices supported.

items.title: Monitor & finish
items.desc: Watch bitrate in your browser. Auto cleanup after the stream ends.

pricing.title: Simple pay-as-you-go pricing
pricing.sub: No setup fees. No monthly charges. Pay only for what you use.
pricing.note: ※ Pricing will apply after the beta period ends

plans.name: SRT Server
plans.desc:
SRT receive server only.
For those with their own OBS.

plans.name: SRT + OBS
plans.desc:
SRT server + cloud OBS.
Pro streaming without any hardware.

cta.sub1: We'll notify you as soon as beta tester

campfire.badge: 🔥 Supporting our CAMPFIRE campaign is required to be selected as a beta tester
